description.zh-Hans: 通过多段颜色渐变重新映射亮度（或选定通道），对输入图像应用渐变映射。类似于着色节点，但作用于整个图像，拥有更多渐变色标和混合模式。
description.en: Applies a gradient map to an input image by remapping luminance (or a selected channel) through a multi-stop color gradient. Similar to ColorizeNode but operates on the full image with more gradient stops and blending modes.

triggers.zh-Hans: 渐变映射, 渐变贴图, 色调映射, 颜色渐变映射
triggers.en: gradient map, gradient mapping, tone mapping, color gradient

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 使用自定义渐变映射将灰度图像转换为彩色风格。
exampleUsage.en: Apply a custom gradient map to transform a grayscale image into a colored style.
